overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking along Del Perro Pier at sunset. The character moves from the pier entrance toward the amusement park, passing benches and railings with ocean views, eventually reaching the crowded area with a Ferris wheel and roller coaster.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden pier walkway with ocean views

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden pier with the ocean visible to the right

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the pier walkway
blue metal safety railing along the ocean side
calm ocean water reflecting the setting sun
large ship visible on the horizon
green wooden benches along the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the wooden planks of the pier with the ocean visible to the right. The sun is setting over the water, casting a warm golden glow across the scene. Benches and railings line the walkway, with a few pedestrians scattered in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: pier transition zone approaching amusement park

events.description: character pauses briefly to look out at the ocean view
character resumes walking toward the amusement park

agents.ego_description: pausing to observe the ocean view then continuing toward the amusement park

notable_agents.action: standing by the railing looking at the ocean

entered.detail: blue building with large Santa Monica Pier signage
large white Ferris wheel structure at the pier end
sandy beach visible beyond the pier railing

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the end of the pier, pausing to look at the ocean before continuing. The amusement park becomes visible ahead with the Ferris wheel and roller coaster tracks appearing in the distance. The beach and city skyline become visible on the left side as the character progresses.

scene_state.functional_zone: amusement park entrance with colorful buildings

events.description: entering the amusement park area with rides and colorful structures

agents.ego_description: walking toward the amusement park entrance passing other pedestrians

entered.detail: yellow roller coaster tracks rising overhead
bright green and blue amusement park structures
red food cart with umbrella on the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character enters the amusement park area, passing under the roller coaster tracks. The Ferris wheel dominates the center view while colorful buildings and food stalls line the walkway. The crowd density increases as the character approaches the main amusement area.

scene_state.functional_zone: crowded amusement park boardwalk under roller coaster

events.description: character transitions from walking to running through the crowd

agents.ego_description: running through the crowded amusement park area beneath the roller coaster

notable_agents.action: crowd of people gathered near the center of the walkway

entered.detail: game booths and food stalls lining both sides of the walkway
dense gathering of pedestrians in the amusement area

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the densely populated amusement park, passing under the roller coaster tracks and alongside game booths. The area is bustling with activity as the character navigates through the crowd toward the center of the pier's entertainment district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a wooden pier that transforms from a quiet seaside walkway into a bustling amusement park at sunset. It begins with the character walking over wooden planks under a warm golden glow, with the ocean stretching out to the right and scattered pedestrians in the distance. As the character pauses to look at the water, the view expands to reveal the city skyline on the left and the distant silhouettes of a Ferris wheel and roller coaster ahead. The scene then shifts into the amusement park area, passing under towering coaster tracks and past colorful food stalls as the crowd density increases. Finally, the camera navigates through a densely populated entertainment district, moving alongside game booths and bustling activity toward the center of the pier.
